title: Internal error with $countbits in property assertion

features.name: countbits function in SVA property assertion
features.description: Code should include a $countbits function call inside an assert property statement with disable iff clocking

features.name: countbits with literal zero second argument
features.description: Code should include a $countbits call with a literal '0 as the second argument in an assertion context

features.name: countones equivalent working in same assertion context
features.description: Code should include $countones working correctly in an identical assert property context where $countbits fails
